BONUS – Squeeze Page WALKTHROUGHS
Squeeze PAGE WORKSHEET
Tips for your Squeeze Page:
• 	Avoid video on your squeeze pages...it generally lowers response
• 	Have a good opt-in offer
• 	Curiosity is a huge win
• 	The headline and the offer is what matters
• 	Eliminate distractions on the page and get rid of exit options
• 	Any squeeze page is better than the almost-perfect page that isn’t up yet
• 	Get version 1.0 up and then iterate
• 	Test (simple with LeadPages)
Using the worksheet below as a guide, map out the critical elements to creating an awesome
squeeze page for your offer.
1. Headline:
• 	Focus on results first: (To be more attractive, smarter, healthier, wealthier,
productive, safer or more secure, solve a problem)
• 	Make an offer (i.e., FREE: report, video, video series, e-book, training, download,
app, worksheet, blueprint)
• 	Curiosity often works (depending on relationship)
Sample Squeeze Page Headline Formulas
• 	How to [SOLVE PROBLEM or ACHIEVE DREAM] without [NORMAL
UNDESIRABLE SOLUTION]
• 	How to [SOLVE PROBLEM or ACHIEVE DREAM] – The Ultimate Guide
• 	Proven [#] Step Process to [SOLVE PROBLEM or ACHIEVE DREAM] in [TIME
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
